title: Goldman Sachs Completes Acquisition of Innovator Capital Management
text: Goldman Sachs completed its acquisition of Innovator Capital Management, a defined outcome exchange-traded fund specialist, in April 2026. Innovator had approximately $31 billion in assets under supervision across 171 ETFs, and the acquisition expanded Goldman Sachs Asset Management to roughly 240 ETFs globally. Goldman said the transaction increased its ETF assets under supervision to about $90 billion and made Goldman Sachs Asset Management a top ten global active ETF provider. The deal is important for Goldman Sachs' investment story because it supports growth in Asset & Wealth Management, expands fee-based investment products, and strengthens the firm's position in active ETFs. Defined outcome ETFs use options-based strategies to target income, growth, and risk-managed outcomes, which may appeal to investors seeking more customized portfolios through different market cycles.
